description: A general research question whose search results include both useful candidates and results that must be rejected (a suspicious executable download and a scraped mirror duplicating the official source).
expected_behavior: An official (.gov) source ranks official_primary and outranks generic pages. A useful generic result is retained for review. A direct executable download is rejected as unsafe_or_unusable (suspicious_download). A mirror duplicating the official source is rejected (duplicate_of_official).
query: retrieval augmented generation benchmark official guide

results.title: Retrieval augmented generation benchmark - official guide
Retrieval augmented generation benchmark - official guide
